# Backlog

Durable follow-up items that are useful across sessions but not part of the current change.

## Entry format

```markdown
## YYYY-MM-DD - Backlog title

- Context: why this should be revisited
- Task: smallest useful next action
- Owner/trigger: who or what should pick it up
- Source: issue, PR, review, or local workflow that produced it
```

## Safety

Do not store secrets, credentials, personal data, private customer data, or temporary one-off notes here.
